title: hierochloe antarctica
intro: Hierochloe antarctica, also known as Antarctic sweet grass, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family. It is native to the sub-Antarctic islands, where it grows in moist, rocky areas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The leaves of Hierochloe antarctica can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and have also been used to support digestive health and reduce stress.
